name: Latency-Response Theory Model: Evaluating Large Language Models via Response Accuracy and Chain-of-Thought Length

description: arXiv:2512.07019v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The proliferation of Large Language Models (LLMs) necessitates valid evaluation methods to provide guidance for both downstream applications and actionable future improvements. The Item Response Theory (IRT) model with Computerized Adaptive Testing has recently emerged as a promising framework for evaluating LLMs via their response accur...
author: Zhiyu Xu, Jia Liu, Yixin Wang, Yuqi Gu
